narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township I (precinct in Lucas County) has 854 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
